details.test: Task 1: Shortlist 3 public-sector tender services between 50k and 100k
Task 2: Select 3 procurement training courses under 1500 with rating >=4 after 2025-07-01
Task 3: Download IT software RFP template >500k and save related article
Task 4: Create and save savings estimate scenario with non-lite option and fee <200k
Task 5: Add 3 EU manufacturing case studies >5M since 2022 to comparison and save
Task 6: Book 30-minute retail consultation on a Tuesday morning next month
Task 7: Create project brief with 2 services and 1 Germany report under 5k, then save
Task 8: Subscribe via tender strategy article form with 3 specific topics
Task 9: Configure and save vendor evaluation matrix with 4 criteria
